samuel-abada.name: Samuel Abada
samuel-abada.title: Lead Mobile Engr, Shuttlers Mobility. Google Developer Expert Flutter & Dart
samuel-abada.shortbio: Samuel Abada is a Google Developer Expert for Flutter and Dart and leads mobile engineering at Shuttlers Mobility. With 8 years of experience in the software industry, he has dedicated the last 6 years to mobile development, particularly with Flutter. He co-organizes the Flutter Lagos and Flutter Akure communities, as well as GDG Akure. Samuel is passionate about open-source technologies, building developer tooling and sharing knowledge through articles and talks. Outside of coding, he enjoys gaming and anime.
samuel-abada.bio: Samuel Abada is a Google Developer Expert for Flutter and Dart and leads the mobile engineering efforts at Shuttlers Mobility. With 8 years of experience in the software industry, Samuel has spent the last 6 years focusing on mobile development, particularly with Flutter. He is a co-organizer of the Flutter Lagos and Flutter Akure communities, as well as the Google Developer Groups, Akure. Passionate about open-source technologies and building developer tooling, Samuel enjoys sharing knowledge through technical articles and speaking at events and conferences. Outside of coding, Samuel is an avid gamer, lover of anime.
samuel-abada.session_title: OTA Flutter Updates with Shorebird: From Setup to Production Success

ngesa-marvin.name: Ngesa Marvin
ngesa-marvin.title: GDE - ML, Device Manager - Safaricom PLC
ngesa-marvin.shortbio: Ngesa is an Engineering Manager and ML Engineer specializing in signal and image processing for computer vision. He began his Cloud ML journey as an Intel AI Innovator and worked as an IoT Solutions Engineer at Liquid Telecom. He is Device Manager – Cloud & AIoT at Safaricom PLC, an Arm AI Ambassador, and a Google Developer Expert for ML. Recently, he focused on sensor data from IoT devices to improve lifecycles. Ngesa founded Nairobi AI, leads ML efforts in GDG Nairobi and he believes ML education should be free.
ngesa-marvin.bio: Engineering Manager / Machine Learning Engineer specializing in signal and image processing, specifically in the field of computer vision. He started his Cloud ML journey as an Intel AI Innovator and later joined Liquid Telecom as an IoT Solutions Engineer. He is currently the Device Manager – Cloud & AIoT at Safaricom PLC and an Arm AI Ambassador. He is also a Google Developer Expert for ML. When not building products, he loves to teach and share knowledge with others. He believes ML education should be free and accessible to all. As of late, he has been working on sensor data analysis from IoT devices to help manag Device lifecycles and drive the right customer experience. He founded Nairobi AI and leads Machine Learning efforts in communities such as GDG Nairobi and Tiny ML Kenya.
ngesa-marvin.session_title: Building Advanced Assistants (Agentic RAGs) with Gemma 2 and Llama Index

He is also a Full-Stack Blockchain and Web developer with professional frontend, backend, and web3 experiences. He has worked as a mobile developer with LokDon, Coders Triangle and VorbTech Innovative Solutions. samson-goddy.name: Samson Goddy
samson-goddy.title: OSS Program Manager, Hedera Hashgraph
samson-goddy.shortbio: Samson Goddy is a seasoned open source program manager and DevRel professional with over a decade of experience working with multicultural teams, excelling in community building, advocacy, and strategic partnerships within developer communities. Co-founder of Open Source Community Africa (OSCA), and is currently involved in open source work with Hedera Hashgraph, focusing on community growth around its hashgraph consensus algorithm. Samson is also a GitHub Star and serves on the board of the Open Source Collective.
samson-goddy.bio: Samson Goddy is a seasoned open source program manager and DevRel professional with over a decade of experience working with multi-cultural teams and extensive expertise in community building, advocacy, and strategic partnerships around the developer's communities. Co-founder of Open Source Community Africa (OSCA), and currently doing Open Source work with Hedera Hashgraph, focusing on nurturing the community around Hedera's innovative hashgraph consensus algorithm. He is a Github star, while currently serving on the board of Open Source Collective.
samson-goddy.session_title: Decentralization is Not Open Source: Unraveling the Misconceptions

gift-ojeabulu.name: Gift Ojeabulu
gift-ojeabulu.title: Co-founder of Data Community Africa, ML Developer and Relations Specialist at iterative.ai.
gift-ojeabulu.shortbio: Gift Ojeabulu is a distinguished Data scientist, Co-founder of Data Community Africa, and Board member at DevNetwork. His professional expertise lies in machine learning, focusing particularly on sports analytics and developer relations. As a dedicated AI and Python advocate, Gift has made significant strides in empowering African data communities. He spearheaded the African Data Community Newsletter, a widely read publication reaching audiences across 45 countries and 8 U.S. states, with over 2,200 subscribers.
gift-ojeabulu.bio: Gift Ojeabulu is a distinguished Data scientist, Co-founder of Data Community Africa, and Board member at DevNetwork. His professional expertise lies in machine learning, focusing particularly on sports analytics and developer relations. As a dedicated AI and Python advocate, Gift has made significant strides in empowering African data communities. He spearheaded the African Data Community Newsletter, a widely read publication reaching audiences across 45 countries and 8 U.S. states, with over 2,200 subscribers. This initiative has evolved over time, spawning impactful projects like MLOps Lagos and a full-fledged non-profit organization known for DatafestAfrica. Gift's commitment to advancing technology in Africa extends to his leadership of the MLOps community in Lagos. This initiative concentrates on cutting-edge areas of practical machine learning operations (MLOps) and Large Language Models (LLMs) use cases in organizations, fostering innovation, promoting open source in AI, and facilitating knowledge sharing in the region.
gift-ojeabulu.session_title: The Role of Developer Relations in the Success of AI/ML Products

With over five years of hands-on experience as a software engineer, Confidence has a deep understanding of the developer ecosystem, enabling him to effectively support enterprise clients and teams in utilizing Cloudflare's solutions for optimal success.
confidence-okoghenun.bio: Confidence is a Senior Developer Advocate at Cloudflare, where he plays a pivotal role in connecting developers with the company's cutting-edge technologies. emike-dania.title: Exercise Physiologist, Physical Education Specialist & CEO, Dania Fitness.
emike-dania.shortbio: Emike Dania Abubakar is an Exercise Physiologist (Ph.D in view), as well as a certified Zumba instructor with 9 years experience ranging across Personal/Group fitness training, Corporate Wellness, Fitness testing/assessments, Fitness consulting for Gym Setup, Team Building & Staff recruitment, Physical Education & Exercise Science Research. She is passionate about helping individuals live healthier active lives, and providing fitness solutions for corporate organizations
emike-dania.bio: Emike Dania Abubakar is an Exercise Physiologist (Ph.D in view), as well as a certified Zumba instructor with 9 years experience ranging across Personal/Group fitness training, Corporate Wellness, Fitness testing/assessments, Fitness consulting for Gym Setup, Team Building & Staff recruitment, Physical Education & Exercise Science Research. She is passionate about helping individuals live healthier active lives, and providing fitness solutions for corporate organizations to improve their staff health, welfare & productivity through effective industry techniques, quality fitness services, and customized flexible processes (both virtual and on-site).

oluwaseyi-ajadi.name: Oluwaseyi Ajadi
oluwaseyi-ajadi.title: Quality Assurance Engineer and Penetration Tester
oluwaseyi-ajadi.shortbio: With over five years of experience in Quality Assurance, penetration testing, and automation, Oluwaseyi brings a thorough and meticulous approach to software testing. His  expertise spans the entire software lifecycle, from design sessions to post-live maintenance, ensuring that quality is embedded at every stage of development. He is committed to making quality an integral part of every process and placing security at the forefront of all development practices.

With a keen eye for detail and a focus on scalability, he works tirelessly to ensure that his software solutions are accessible to as many people as possible. In addition to his work as a software engineer, he am an active contributor and maintainer of numerous open-source projects. He constantly strives to make a positive impact on the devs community.

Uchechukwu also empowers the developer community as a co-organizer of Vue.js Nigeria and a creator of educational content for Vue Mastery. She has contributed significantly to the tech community, volunteering as a Design Mentor and speaking at various tech events and conferences. ezekiel-kingsley.name: Nkorom Ezekiel Kingsley
ezekiel-kingsley.title: Security Analyst
ezekiel-kingsley.shortbio: Ezekiel is a cybersecurity professional with a diverse background in the field. Having completed internships with industry giants such as Mastercard and IBM, He has gained valuable experience and insights into cybersecurity practices and technologies. Following these internships, he contributed to SigmaPay, further honing his skills in the industry. Currently, he is enrolled in the Google Cybersecurity course to stay at the forefront of emerging trends and technologies.
ezekiel-kingsley.bio: Ezekiel is a cybersecurity professional with a diverse background in the field. Having completed internships with industry giants such as Mastercard and IBM, He has gained valuable experience and insights into cybersecurity practices and technologies. Following these internships, he contributed to SigmaPay, further honing his skills in the industry. Currently, he is enrolled in the Google Cybersecurity course to stay at the forefront of emerging trends and technologies. He has also made notable contributions to the cybersecurity community by speaking at various events, including Rustlang Conf42. Presently, he serves as a Cybersecurity Analyst at USCO (Unified Scientific and Creative Operations), where the team leverages their expertise to protect and secure digital assets. With a robust background and ongoing commitment to learning and sharing knowledge, He will continue to make significant strides in the cybersecurity landscape.
ezekiel-kingsley.session_title: Cybersecurity Awareness For Small And Medium Enterprises

jeffery.name: Jeffery Abdulateef-Adoga
jeffery.title: Senior Product Designer at Andela, Design Director at Urban Effect Media
jeffery.shortbio: Jeffery Abdulateef Adoga is a distinguished product designer, entrepreneur, and mentor with over a decade of experience in the digital technology sector. With a background in computer science, Jeffery has consistently demonstrated his ability to merge creativity with technology to solve complex problems and drive business success. Throughout his career, Jeffery has been at the forefront of designing and launching cutting-edge digital products that have significantly impacted the tech landscape in Africa and beyond.
jeffery.bio: Jeffery Abdulateef Adoga is a distinguished product designer, entrepreneur, and mentor with over a decade of experience in the digital technology sector. With a strong background in computer science and a deep passion for innovative design, Jeffery has consistently demonstrated his ability to merge creativity with technology to solve complex problems and drive business success. Throughout his career, Jeffery has been at the forefront of designing and launching cutting-edge digital products that have significantly impacted the tech landscape in Africa and beyond. His expertise spans various industries, including fintech, healthcare, and telecommunications, where he has led high-performing teams in creating user-centred solutions that enhance user experience and drive engagement. Jeffery's professional journey includes pivotal roles at renowned organisations such as Reliance Health, Interswitch Group, and Antigravity. At Reliance Health, he was instrumental in developing a seamless prescription access flow for the company's telemedicine app, directly benefiting thousands of users across Nigeria. His strategic design initiatives at Interswitch Group led to the successful training of entry-level designers and the establishment of a robust design system that streamlined operations and improved efficiency.
jeffery.session_title: The WHY Bucket - Cultivating a Culture of Continuous Curiosity Within Product Organisations

She is an Open source evangelist and has led great efforts in around DEI, Documentation, and Community growth as a member of CHAOSS Board of directors.

His superpower is connection – He is passionate about collaborating with people, understanding their perspectives, and translating those needs into impactful designs. With a focus on outcomes over outputs, John is dedicated to creating usable, functional digital products that truly satisfy users. He is an active contributor to the tech community.

robert-john.name: Robert John
robert-john.title: Arm Innovator | Edge Impulse Expert | Google Developer Expert
robert-john.shortbio: Robert has worked with databases and developed enterprise software for over two decades. He works with everything data on the Google Cloud Platform, from engineering to visualization and Machine Learning. He started working with embedded systems and TinyML three years ago and is eager to see the widespread adoption of embedded systems in Africa. In the past, Robert worked as a software engineer, building systems for finance, telecommunications, and utilities/energy vending.
robert-john.bio: Robert has worked with databases and developed enterprise software for over two decades. He works with everything data on the Google Cloud Platform, from engineering to visualization and Machine Learning. He started working with embedded systems and TinyML three years ago and is eager to see the widespread adoption of embedded systems in Africa. In the past, Robert worked as a software engineer, building systems for finance, telecommunications, and utilities/energy vending. Robert's vision extends beyond his current work. He eagerly anticipates a future where Africans will not only use but also design and build their own embedded systems with Machine Learning capabilities. Robert is a proactive contributor to the developer ecosystem. He shares his knowledge and insights by speaking at events,  hosting meetups and code labs, and creating tutorials. His written work, published on platforms like Hackster.io, Medium, and his personal blog, covers a range of topics including data visualization, ML, and Google Cloud Platform (GCP). He also serves as a mentor at the Google for Startups Africa Accelerator programme and co-organizes the GDG Cloud developer community in Kaduna, Nigeria
robert-john.session_title: Scale Out Your DevOps with T2A Machine Types

lois-bassey.name: Lois Bassey
lois-bassey.title: Software x DevOps Engineer & Founder @Codevixens

She’s worked on building and maintaining scalable systems, while also gaining solid expertise in DevOps practices like continuous integration, deployment, and automation.Beyond her technical roles, Lois is the founder of Codevixens, a tech organization that empowers women in technology as well as a program director
lois-bassey.bio: Lois Bassey is a seasoned software engineer and DevOps professional with over 5 years of hands-on experience in backend development and cloud infrastructure. She’s worked on building and maintaining scalable systems, while also gaining solid expertise in DevOps practices like continuous integration, deployment, and automation.Beyond her technical roles, Lois is the founder of Codevixens, a tech organization that empowers women in technology. As a program director, she has created and led various successful tech educational programs, helping over 6,000 people build the skills they need to thrive in the tech world. Through her mentorship, Lois is passionate about guiding others on their own journeys into tech.Lois brings a mix of technical expertise and a passion for teaching, and she’s excited to share her experience and knowledge at this event.
lois-bassey.session_title: Building a Multi-Tenant SaaS with Microservices on Kubernetes
